pages.text:
TRANSLATION.

IN THE NAME OF HIS MAJESTY KING ANANDA MAHIDOL

THE COUNCIL OF REGENCY

(Signature) ADITYA DIBABHA (Signature) CHAO PHYA YOMARAJ (Signature) GENERAL CHAO PHYA BIJAYENDRA YODHIN

come,

To all and singular to whom these Presents shall

Greeting

Being desirous of concluding a Treaty revising the

treaties hitherto existing between Siam and France.

We have, with that object in view, invested Luang

Pradist Manudharm, Minister of Foreign Affairs in whose wisdom, loyalty and diligence We repose trust and confidence, with full power to conduct negotiation on our part with such representative of the French Government as may be empowered to do the same and to conclude and sign a treaty of agreement as shall have for the effect the fulfilment of Our wish.

In the Name of the King We also hereby pledge Ourselves

to approve, if agreeable, whatsoever Our representative shall have in pursuance of the present Power and in accordance with

Our instructions, agreed upon and signed.

In witness whereof We have signed these Presents at

Bangkok, this twenty-fifth day of November in the year of

Our Lord the Buddha Two Thousand Four Hundred and Eighty, being the fourth year of His Majesty's Reign.

(Signature) COLONEL PHYA PHAHOL-PHOL-PHAYUHA-SENA

President of the Council.

Certified true copy.

nilov

ОБТЕБОВЕТОА
